title: S2 (NON-DROPPABLE): bee-scribing authors CONCEPTS — bundle-first, with the fallback proven in a bundle-less fixture
action: This is the switch the whole OKF programme was preparation for (G3). Today skills/bee-scribing/SKILL.md references docs/specs/ eight times and docs/knowledge/ zero times while the bundle already holds 116 concepts — new knowledge still flows to the retired tree. THREE PARTS, and part 1 comes first because the advisor measured that the fallback rots through its predicate, not its prose. (1) ONE PREDICATE (G8): export bundleMode(root) from knowledge.mjs — TRUE only when docs/knowledge/ exists AND at least one concept actually parses. Never a bare path.join, never re-invented in prose per skill. A stray .gitkeep must NOT flip a host repo into bundle mode. Every rewired path cites this one function. (2) SCRIBING AUTHORS CONCEPTS (G3, gated by G9): rewrite skills/bee-scribing/SKILL.md so that WHEN bundleMode is true it authors/updates concepts under docs/knowledge/areas/, with three explicit paths — (a) subject already owned by a concept -> update THAT concept; (b) new subject in an existing area -> author a new concept in that area and regenerate the index; (c) brand-new area -> create areas/<slug>/ with an overview concept. GATE (a) vs (b) ON bee.authoritative_for: a new concept may NOT claim a subject an existing concept already owns — that is the anti-fork mechanism today's 'one area = one file, forever' rule provided and which splitting into concepts would otherwise delete. Port the nine-section skeleton and the rebuild bar into the area-concept template in docs/specs/okf-profile.md Templates, so body quality is specified rather than left to discretion. Frontmatter ALWAYS through emitFrontmatter — hand-written frontmatter has been caught not_canonical repeatedly, including twice by the orchestrator. WHEN bundleMode is FALSE the skill's behaviour is TODAY'S docs/specs/ behaviour, byte-for-byte, with NO deprecation notice and no nag (G1). (3) THE FALLBACK NEEDS ITS OWN PERMANENT SUITE: a chain test that builds a bundle-LESS fixture repo and drives the scribing decision tree there, asserting the docs/specs/ path is selected and no bundle path is touched; plus a bundle-ful fixture asserting the concept path is selected; plus the .gitkeep case asserting an empty docs/knowledge/ does NOT flip the mode. Bee's own checkout has a bundle and G2 will forbid new prose under docs/specs/, so the home repo structurally CANNOT exercise the fallback end to end — only a fixture can. RED-FIRST: capture all of (3) red before implementing.

truths: node scripts/run_verify.mjs exits 0 (76 suites incl. the new bundle-mode suite)
red evidence: the bundle-mode/fallback tests failed before implementation (verbatim)
bundleMode(root) is exported from knowledge.mjs and is FALSE for a docs/knowledge/ containing only a .gitkeep — demonstrated
the bundle-less fixture selects the docs/specs/ path and touches NO bundle path — demonstrated, and no deprecation/nag text is emitted
the bundle-ful fixture selects the concept path
skills/bee-scribing/SKILL.md no longer instructs writing new area truth into docs/specs/ when a bundle exists — grep counts quoted before and after
the area-concept template in okf-profile.md carries the nine-section skeleton and the rebuild bar
authoritative_for gating is specified: a new concept may not claim an owned subject
prohibitions: never emit a deprecation notice or nag in the fallback path (G1) — old projects must feel nothing
never let a bare path.join or a per-skill prose re-statement decide bundle mode (G8)
never allow two concepts to claim one subject (G9)
never hand-write concept frontmatter — emitFrontmatter only
do not delete any pointer stub (G7)
do not add the docs/specs read-only guard here — S3 owns it

trace.outcome: bee-scribing authors concepts bundle-first: ONE bundleMode predicate (a .gitkeep is not a bundle), the anti-fork authoritative_for gate, and the compatibility fallback proven permanently in a bundle-less fixture
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "summary": "f3-2 — bee-scribing authors CONCEPTS, bundle-first, fallback proven in a bundle-less fixture.

THREE PARTS DELIVERED

(1) ONE PREDICATE (G8). `bundleMode(root)` exported from lib/knowledge.mjs (mirrored
    .bee/bin/lib/ <-> skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/, byte-identical). TRUE only when
    docs/knowledge/ exists AND at least one non-reserved .md parses with a `type`.
    Never a bare path.join; never restated in prose. `scribingTarget(root,{area,subject,intent})`
    is the executable decision tree and derives its mode from bundleMode and nothing else.

(2) SCRIBING AUTHORS CONCEPTS (G3, gated by G9). skills/bee-scribing/SKILL.md §2 split into
    §2a bundle mode (three paths, gated on bee.authoritative_for) and §2b no-bundle (today's
    "One area = one file, forever." paragraph, unchanged, un-annotated). Nine-section skeleton
    + rebuild bar ported into the new `bee.area` template in docs/specs/okf-profile.md §Templates.
    Frontmatter always through emitFrontmatter, with the exact invocation in the skill.

(3) PERMANENT FALLBACK SUITE. skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bundle_mode.mjs — 24 checks,
    three fixture repos, pinned into scripts/test_verify_manifest.mjs MANDATORY_SUITES so it can
    never silently drop out of the chain.",
  "red_failure_evidence": "RED EVIDENCE #1 — the suite written and run BEFORE implementation (verbatim):

    file:///home/thanhsmind/projects/goglbe/beegog/skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bundle_mode.mjs:35
    import { emitFrontmatter, bundleMode, scribingTarget } from '../lib/knowledge.mjs';
                              ^^^^^^^^^^
    SyntaxError: The requested module '../lib/knowledge.mjs' does not provide an export named 'bundleMode'
    EXIT=1

RED EVIDENCE #2 — counter-red proving the .gitkeep assertions discriminate. lib/knowledge.mjs
was temporarily patched to the naive `return fs.existsSync(bundleDir(root))` (the exact
advisor-finding-1 bug), the suite re-run, then the file restored from the mirror (verbatim):

    patched to naive existsSync predicate
    FAIL  bundleMode is FALSE for a docs/knowledge/ containing only a .gitkeep (a directory is not a bundle)
    FAIL  bundleMode is FALSE for a bundle holding only reserved files (index.md / log.md are not concepts)
    FAIL  bundleMode is FALSE when no concept actually parses (frontmatter absent or unparseable)
    FAIL  bundleMode never throws on a nonexistent root or on a file where the bundle dir should be
    FAIL  .gitkeep fixture: the empty docs/knowledge/ still routes to docs/specs/ (the silent-rot case)
    FAIL  bee-scribing routes on the ONE predicate and names the bundle area path
    FAIL  the okf-profile area-concept template carries the nine-section skeleton and the rebuild bar
    FAIL test_bundle_mode: 16 passed, 7 failed

    mirror identical: true   (restore verified byte-for-byte against .bee/bin/lib/knowledge.mjs)",
  "fixture_proofs": "THE THREE FIXTURE PROOFS (copied from the suite's own output, this run, EXIT=0):

    PASS  bundleMode is FALSE for a docs/knowledge/ containing only a .gitkeep (a directory is not a bundle)
    PASS  bundle-less fixture: an existing area routes to docs/specs/<area>.md, in place
    PASS  bundle-less fixture: a brand-new area routes to docs/specs/<area>.md — one area, one file, forever
    PASS  bundle-less fixture: NO bundle path is named, and none is created on disk
    PASS  bundle-less fixture: nothing new is emitted — no deprecation notice, no nag, no extra field
    PASS  .gitkeep fixture: the empty docs/knowledge/ still routes to docs/specs/ (the silent-rot case)
    PASS  bundle-ful fixture (a): a subject already owned updates THAT concept
    PASS  bundle-ful fixture (a): ownership matching ignores case and surrounding whitespace
    PASS  bundle-ful fixture (b): a new subject in an existing area authors a new concept there and regenerates the index
    PASS  bundle-ful fixture (c): a brand-new area creates areas/<slug>/ with an overview concept
    PASS  anti-fork: authoring a NEW concept for an already-owned subject is REFUSED, naming the owner
    PASS test_bundle_mode: 24 passed, 0 failed

The bundle-less fixture asserts BOTH halves of the compatibility guarantee: the result names no
docs/knowledge path AND no bundle directory is created on disk (listBundleFiles(root).length === 0),
and the result carries exactly the seven pinned keys with no deprecation/nag string anywhere in it.
The .gitkeep fixture additionally asserts the bundle directory is left exactly as found
(listBundleFiles === ".gitkeep").",
  "grep_counts_before_after": "GREP COUNTS on skills/bee-scribing/SKILL.md (both halves measured in one run, git show HEAD vs
working tree):

    == HEAD (before f3-2) ==
    docs/specs lines: 8
    docs/specs occurrences: 12
    docs/knowledge lines: 0
    docs/knowledge occurrences: 0
    == WORKING (after f3-2) ==
    docs/specs lines: 8
    docs/specs occurrences: 12
    docs/knowledge lines: 7
    docs/knowledge occurrences: 9

The docs/specs count is deliberately UNCHANGED: every one of those twelve is now either the
§2b no-bundle branch, a fallback-only artefact (visuals, system-overview, reading-map, bootstrap),
or the citation of the okf-profile template — the fallback had to survive byte-for-byte, so
deleting those references would have broken the guarantee, not proved it. What changed is that
the one line which unconditionally instructed writing area truth to `docs/specs/<area>.md` (the
capture-mode announce template) now resolves its target through §2, and a suite check asserts the
§2a bundle branch contains no `docs/specs/<area>.md` at all while §2b still carries
"**One area = one file, forever.**" verbatim.",
  "propagation_and_full_chain": "PROPAGATION (in order, after implementation):

    node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --apply   -> status: applied (sync_skill bee-scribing x2, refresh_legacy_global_skill)
    node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs             -> WROTE .claude-plugin/skills: 128 file(s) + .bee-render.json
                                                              WROTE .codex-plugin/skills: 128 file(s) + .bee-render.json
    node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write              -> WROTE docs/history/codex-harness-hardening/release-manifest.json: 437 file(s)

FULL CHAIN (baseline this session was `PASS run_verify: 75 suite(s), concurrency=5, wall=61730ms`;
one new suite joins by discovery):

    PASS run_verify: 76 suite(s), concurrency=5, wall=61848ms
    EXIT=0",
  "scope_held": "SCOPE HELD: no deprecation notice or nag anywhere (asserted, both in the resolver result and over
the whole skill file); one predicate only; no path can produce two concepts for one subject
(fork_denied, plus the pre-existing duplicate-authoritative_for check warning as the second layer);
frontmatter emitter-only; no stub deleted; the docs/specs read-only guard left entirely to S3;
scratch under .bee/tmp/ only."
}
